summary: Install the plugins and skills needed for frontend UX design work and browser-QA.

outputs.name: installed_stack_manifest
outputs.description: List of plugins installed and skills synced.

workflow_steps: Install the 3 Claude plugins defined in the stack.
Sync e2e-review, qa, and voice-test skills into every ~/.claude* profile.

verification.smoke_test: Run `claude plugins list` and verify frontend-design, vercel, and superpowers are installed.
